zh.Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Prussia: 德國安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 巴倫斯泰特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid von Wettin於大約1140年出生時，她的父親Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin43歲，母親Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein38歲。她於1152年與Svend III Grathe of Denmark結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Prussia: 德国安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 巴倫斯泰特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid von Wettin于大约1140年出生时，她的父亲Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin43岁，母亲Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein38岁。她于1152年与Svend III Grathe of Denmark结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Wettin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Johan, Tor.
Swedish: ornamental or habitational name formed with an altered form of the (placename) element väst ‘west’ + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’. Compare Westen .

variants.name: Westen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Shosh, Shoshana.  German Ulrich.

German, Dutch, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German, Middle Low German, Middle Dutch westen, German Westen ‘west’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived to the west of a settlement, or a habitational name for one who had migrated from further west. The Jewish name may also be of ornamental origin.

Swedish (mainly Westén): ornamental or habitational name formed with an altered form of the (placename) element väst ‘west’ + the adjectival suffix -én, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’. Compare Westin .

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid von Wettin was born about 1140, her father, Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin, was 43 and her mother, Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, was 38. She married Svend III Grathe of Denmark in 1152. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid von Wettin est née environ 1140, son père, Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Svend III Grathe of Denmark en 1152. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid von Wettin um 1140 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin 43 und ihre Mutter Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein 38. Sie hat 1152 Svend III Grathe of Denmark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Wettin è nata il circa 1140, sua padre, Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Svend III Grathe of Denmark nel 1152. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia.

ja.Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Prussia: ドイツアンハルトランドクレイス ボーレンステト
ja.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Wettinが約1140年に生まれた時，父Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettinは43歳，母Gräfin Luitgard von Ravensteinは38歳であった。1152年にSvend III Grathe of Denmarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Wettin(이)가 대략 1140년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1152년 Svend III Grathe of Denmark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Wettin nasceu aproximadamente 1140, seu pai, Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Svend III Grathe of Denmark em 1152. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid von Wettin родилась около 1140 г., её отцу по имени Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Svend III Grathe of Denmark в 1152 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelheid von Wettin nació aproximadamente 1140, su papá, Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Svend III Grathe of Denmark en 1152. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
